macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo site teases new Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 release on Switch 2
items.summary: Nintendo’s official site says *Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4* is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 this October, making it one of the biggest platform announcements in the latest gaming news cycle.

items.title: Sony’s latest State of Play highlighted major upcoming games and releases
items.summary: Engadget noted Sony’s State of Play showcase on June 2, which featured over an hour of trailers and game news, including titles such as *Control Resonant* and *Silent Hill: Townfall*.

items.title: Atari acquires *Crossy Road* maker Hipster Whale
items.summary: Engadget reported that Atari is buying the studio behind the *Crossy Road* games, marking a notable industry consolidation move in mobile and casual gaming.

items.title: A California bill aimed at preserving access to video games advances
items.summary: Engadget reported that California lawmakers gave an early victory to a bill that would preserve access to video games, reflecting a notable legal and preservation development in the industry.

items.title: Playstack, the publisher behind *Balatro*, is acquired by Integrated Media Company
items.summary: Engadget reported that private equity firm Integrated Media Company has acquired Playstack, adding another significant publishing-side deal to the industry news cycle.

items.title: *Fallout 76* is coming to PS5 and Xbox Series X/S this summer
items.summary: Engadget reported that native current-gen versions of *Fallout 76* are finally on the way, which is one of the most notable release-related updates from the last 24 hours.

items.title: *Rayman Legends Retold* remake reportedly set for October 1
items.summary: Engadget reported that a *Rayman Legends* remake, *Rayman Legends Retold*, is expected to arrive on October 1 with a standard edition priced at $40.

items.title: Asus unveils the ROG Xbox Ally X handheld with OLED display
items.summary: NewsNow surfaced a fresh handheld gaming hardware announcement from Asus, which unveiled the ROG Xbox Ally X with an OLED display and bundled AR glasses.

items.title: Final Fantasy XIV: Dawntrail Patch 7.51 launches
items.summary: NewsNow reported that *Final Fantasy XIV: Dawntrail* Patch 7.51 launched today, making it a notable live-service update for MMO players.

items.title: Path of Exile 2 expansion boosts game popularity in internet cafe rankings
items.summary: NewsNow reported that a new *Path of Exile 2* expansion helped push the game up to 15th in internet cafe rankings, signaling strong player engagement and an important esports-adjacent community trend.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
